CustomField.description: System-managed field that stores the Metadata API deployment ID for the most recent Recurring Donation Status-to-State mapping custom metadata deployment. Automatically updated when status mappings are saved through NPPatch Settings. Do not modify manually.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: System-managed. Deployment ID for the last Status-to-State mapping deployment. Do not edit manually.
CustomField.label: Status Mapping Deployment Id
